title: n8n API Authentication Troubleshooting Prompts by Auth Type
description: n8n developers struggling with OAuth2, API key, and webhook authentication failures get 20 precise diagnostic prompts to identify misconfiguration, token expiry, and scope issues across third-party integrations.
gumroad_description:
STOP WASTING HOURS DEBUGGING n8n AUTHENTICATION FAILURES

You're staring at a 401 error at 2 AM. Is it OAuth2 misconfiguration? Token expiry? Missing scopes? You can't tell, and neither can Google.

This pack cuts through the guesswork with 20 diagnostic prompts built by someone who's actually debugged these integrations.


WHO THIS IS FOR

— n8n workflow builders hitting authentication walls with third-party APIs
— Automation engineers who need faster troubleshooting workflows
— Teams managing multiple integration types (OAuth2, API keys, webhooks) at once


WHAT'S INSIDE

— 5 OAuth2-specific diagnostic prompts for token and consent issues
— 8 API key prompts covering headers, permissions, and rotation problems
— 4 webhook prompts for listener configuration and security validation
— All prompts formatted for instant pasting into ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini
— Markdown and JSON files for flexibility across your workflow


Skip the documentation rabbit holes. Copy a prompt, get your answer in seconds.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
